title: Thaimasam Lyrics Majaa
stanzas:
I.R. ettu naattukattu
ayyaavodu koothu kattu
yaana katti yaeru poottu
vaaika vetti paathi kattu
pambarama suthikittu
pagaellaam paadu pattaa
velajadhellaam
veedu varum cellamae

Thaimaasam oora kootu
thanjaavooru melam kottu
poo vazha pandhalittu
pudhu ponna vetkapattu
katti varaen koorapattu
kazhuthula nee thalikattu
oadi varren veetavittu

tholu maela kalappa
nee thookkikittu nadappa
aalillaadha neram parthu
nee anga inga idippa

ye paruthikitta neruppa
nee palla kaatti elippa
uththu naanum
paathuputtaa nee
pathu murai kulippa.

hey vala konjam
suruttikittu uzhudhu podaya
un pattinathaar
kovalathu pazhudhu paaraya

oru saakku pokku
solli puttu
odi vaayen di.

I.R. ettu naattukattu
ayyaavodu koothu kattu
yaana katti yaeru poottu
vaaika vetti paathi kattu
pambarama suthikittu
pagaellaam paadu pattaa
velajadhellaam
veedu varum cellamae

ye mutti theriya seela
nee thookki kattura vela
naan kannu muzhichi
kaathiruppen kayithu
kattil mela.

ye aedaakoodaa porappa
unaku aeripochu kozhuppe
nee maasathula moonu
naalu enga poyi paduppa

naalu mola vaetti ippa
naluva paakkudhu
en pathu viral pattiniya
thazhuva pakkudhu

kaanja maadu kammakatta
meya paakkudhu
indha kanni ponnu
karpa ippa kaavu
kaetkudhu..

Thaimaasam oora kootu
thanjaavooru melam kottu
poo vazha pandhalittu
pudhu ponna vetkapattu
katti vaadi koorapattu
kazhuthula nee thalikattu
oadi aadi veetavittu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thaimasam?

The song Thaimasam celebrates the joy of togetherness and festive spirit, reflecting the vibrant culture depicted in the movie Majaa.

What is the plot context of the song in Majaa?

In Majaa, the song is featured during a lively celebration, showcasing the characters' happiness and unity.

Who are the singers of Thaimasam?

The song is sung by renowned artists Anuradha Sriram and Shankar Mahadevan.

Who composed the music for Thaimasam?

The music for Thaimasam was composed by Vidyasagar, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was Thaimasam released?

The song was released on November 2, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Thaimasam from Majaa is a lively and energetic duet that encapsulates the spirit of celebration and joy. It features the vibrant voices of Anuradha Sriram and Shankar Mahadevan, creating an infectious atmosphere perfect for festive occasions. The lyrics evoke a sense of togetherness and happiness, making it a favorite for weddings and parties. Overall, the song conveys a message of unity and joy, resonating with audiences and inviting them to dance along.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaimasam from the movie Majaa is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Anuradha Sriram and Shankar Mahadevan. With Vidyasagar's infectious music, this song perfectly captures the essence of festive gatherings and joyous occasions. Get ready to dance and celebrate as this track fills your heart with energy and happiness!
stanzaMeanings: With the I.R. group, let's gather and perform, bringing joy and laughter, as we celebrate together in our home.
My dear, my dear, my beloved, my beloved.
In the festival season, the village gathers, playing music and celebrating, as I come to take the new bride, singing and dancing, I will run from my home.
My friend, my friend, I have made a wish, I have made a promise.
You should walk with confidence, don't hesitate, look around and see what's happening.
Hey, you are like a fire, showing your strength, I will also watch and learn from you.
Hey, just take it easy and relax, don't worry about what others say.
I will leave now, no one is here.
I.R. group, let's gather and perform, bringing joy and laughter, as we celebrate together in our home.
My dear, my dear, my beloved, my beloved.
You are hiding something, I will keep my eyes closed and wait for you on the bed.
What is this nonsense? You seem to be confused, you have been missing for three or four days.
Now, I am watching you closely, my fingers are itching to touch you.
The beautiful girl is now being admired, and this girl is now being sought after.
In the festival season, the village gathers, playing music and celebrating, as I come to take the new bride, singing and dancing, I will run from my home.
My dear, my dear, my friend, my friend.
